message:
fix(widgets,tests): tracing callsite cache race prevention and shadow-run determinism relaxation

Widget tracing test stability (input, list, modal/stack, table, tabs, tree):
- Insert tracing::callsite::rebuild_interest_cache() calls between
  event handling and rendering operations in widget tests to prevent
  parallel workspace test runs from perturbing callsite interest after
  the subscriber is installed
- Recover from poisoned tracing test lock via unwrap_or_else(into_inner)
  so a panicked earlier tracing assertion doesn't cascade-fail all
  subsequent tracing tests in the same process

Shadow-run determinism (ftui-runtime):
- Relax shadow_deterministic_across_multiple_runs to compare semantic
  properties (traces, running state, tick_rate, cmd_log_len, frame
  hashes) instead of raw terminal_output and logs, because inline
  terminal emission includes scheduler-sensitive cursor-control traffic
  that varies when background task completion interleaves with log writes

Renderable snapshots (ftui-widgets):
- Update Group rendering test expectation: Paragraph now clears its
  owned area before drawing, so a later overlapping Paragraph produces
  spaces (not the earlier child's content) in the non-written cells

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
